sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26174" key="diauca/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαυξάνω</orth>, <sense id="n26174.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spread out,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
